title: Datadog (DDOG) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Datadog Stock Forecast and Analyst Consensus. Current Price Target: Among 45 analysts covering DDOG stock the consensus is Strong Buy with 39 Strong Buy ratings 3 Moderate Buys 2 Holds and 1 Strong Sell. Price Target Analysis: The average analyst price target of 216.35 represents an 8.2 percent premium to DDOG's current price levels. Another analyst consensus shows 33 analysts with a Strong Buy rating and an average price target of 204.82 forecasting a 2.33 percent increase over the next year. Financial Guidance: DDOG expects full-year adjusted EPS in the range of 2.36 to 2.44 and revenue ranging from 4.30 billion to 4.34 billion. Recent Stock Performance: DDOG shares surged 31.3 percent after reporting Q1 results with adjusted EPS of 0.60 topping Wall Street expectations of 0.50. Stock Outperformance: Datadog has outperformed the broader market considerably over the past year and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock's prospects.
